Notice Of Motion And Motion: For An Order Deeming Each Of Plaintiff'S Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted, And To Have Three Documents Created By Defendant Authenticated As Genuine; To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Form And Special Interrogatories; To Compel Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions And Other Relief
Off Calendar Jul-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER WICKLIFFE's Motion: For An Order Deeming Each Of Plaintiff'S Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted, And To Have Three Documents Created By Defendant Authenticated As Genuine; To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Form And Special Interrogatories; To Compel Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions And Other Relief.

Plaintiff Jennifer Wickliffe's discovery motion is granted.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
